# StarRiver Arts

> Public static site for StarRiver Arts — VR application design, landscape and terrain modeling, ProjectT Taiwan landscape experiences, VR Racing Club Time Attack records, and digital curation.

Generated: 2026-07-15T10:23:40+08:00
Canonical site: https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/
Languages: Traditional Chinese / English.

## Machine-readable indexes

- [site-index.json](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/site-index.json): full page inventory with titles, descriptions, tags, headings, and search text.
- [search-index.json](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/search-index.json): compact browser/client search cache.
- [llm-index.json](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/llm-index.json): compact LLM-oriented context map.
- [sitemap.xml](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/sitemap.xml): canonical crawl URLs.

## Primary sections

- [Home](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/): StarRiver Arts brand entry for Studio, ProjectT, and Museum.
- [Studio](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/studio.html): curated work in VR application design, landscape modeling, and digital curation.
- [ProjectT](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/): Taiwan landscape VR experiences, Racing Club, and Time Attack.
- [Time Attack](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/): VR Racing Club records station with tracks, players, vehicles, events, and catalog pages.
- [Museum](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/): preseason web exhibitions and digital curation preview.

## Indexed pages

### Museum

- [About | StarRiver Museum](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/about.html): StarRiver Museum 關於頁，說明美術館如何把 VR、網頁與空間敘事視為展覽媒介。
- [Contact | StarRiver Museum](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/contact.html): StarRiver Museum 聯絡頁，供合作邀請、展覽提案、支持洽談或一般詢問使用。
- [季前展 | StarRiver Museum](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/): StarRiver Museum 季前展以兩件網頁展覽預覽未來的數位策展與常設展方向。

### Museum Interactive Systems

- [Falloff Predictor · 光衰減預估](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/interactive/design-system-visualize/falloff-predictor.html): VR Gallery Spatial System 的光衰減預估工具，用於比較虛擬展場光線距離與可讀性。
- [Gallery Study Modules | Museum | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/interactive/design-system-visualize/): Gallery Study Modules：整理空間規劃與光衰減預估兩個 VR 展場研究互動模組。
- [Spatial Planner · 空間規劃工具](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/interactive/design-system-visualize/spatial-planner.html): VR Gallery Spatial System 的空間規劃互動工具，用於理解展場尺度、觀看距離與配置。
- [VR Gallery Spatial System — Web Exhibitions · StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/interactive/vr-gallery-spatial-system/): VR Gallery Spatial System：虛擬實境美術館的空間、文字標識與展場設計系統網頁展覽。

### ProjectT

- [ProjectT | 臺灣地景 VR 體驗](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/): ProjectT 以臺灣道路與地景創作為核心，連結 VRChat 世界、Racing Club 與 Time Attack。

### StarRiver Arts

- [StarRiver Arts | VR 數位體驗的地景創作者](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/): StarRiver Arts 以 VR 應用設計、景觀地景建模與數位策展規劃，連結 Studio、ProjectT 與 Museum 季前展。

### Studio

- [Studio | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/studio.html): StarRiver Arts 的精選作品與專業能力：VR 應用設計、景觀地景建模與數位策展規劃。

### Studio Projects

- [Project T — 九彎十八拐 — StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/projects/9turns.html): ProjectT 九彎十八拐：以臺 9 線石牌至頭城段為基礎的 VRChat 道路地景作品。
- [Beyond Gravity — StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/projects/beyond-gravity.html): Beyond Gravity：以 VRChat 空間呈現 Skyhook 軌道運輸與太空站尺度的沉浸式概念作品。
- [StarSight Mt. 觀星山 — StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/projects/starsight-mt.html): StarSight Mt. 觀星山：ProjectT 的 VRChat 山地觀星與臺灣地景世界專案。

### VR Racing Club Time Attack

- [Track Map | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/TrackMap/): Time Attack 賽道地圖頁，以地理視角整理賽道路線、地點與紀錄資料。
- [Index | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/catalog.html): Time Attack 索引頁，整合賽道、地點、車輛、玩家與資料目錄。
- [Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/): VR Racing Club Time Attack 的總覽頁，聚合賽道、玩家、車輛、活動、索引與站台資訊。
- [Info | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/info.html): Time Attack 站台資訊頁，包含資料摘要、builder 狀態、更新資訊與資料來源說明。
- [Player | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/player.html): 單一玩家檔案頁，可由查詢參數載入個人 PB、參與賽道、車輛與紀錄歷史。
- [Players | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/players.html): Time Attack 玩家索引與玩家表現分析，整理 PB、參與路線與排行榜資料。
- [Track | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/track.html): 單一賽道詳情頁，可由查詢參數載入特定路線的紀錄榜、車輛與玩家表現。
- [Tracks | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/tracks.html): Time Attack 賽道分析與賽道排行榜入口，依路線檢視紀錄、玩家與車輛表現。
- [Vehicle | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/vehicle.html): 單一車輛檔案頁，可由查詢參數載入車輛變體、使用玩家、路線紀錄與表現。
- [Vehicles | Time Attack | VR Racing Club | StarRiver Arts](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/vehicles.html): Time Attack 車輛索引與車種表現分析，整理車輛、變體、紀錄與使用趨勢。

## Notes for LLM consumers

- Prefer `llm-index.json` for a compact context map and `site-index.json` when page-level search text is useful.
- Time Attack pages load JSON client-side; use the data endpoints above for structured records and catalog data.
- The site represents StarRiver / 星河, a Taiwan creator working in VR applications, landscape modeling, ProjectT, VR racing, and digital curation.
